description: Human-curated spot checks for corpus integrity and future retrieval evaluation. Each label references a manifest document id and a criterion serial_number from app/criteria.json. must_contain_substrings: case-insensitive; every string must appear in the PDF extract for the label to remain valid.

labels.notes: Shielding / outdoor lighting topic appears in City of Flagstaff text layer.
City of Bend extract should mention lighting and the jurisdiction name.
Purpose / dark skies themes in Sisters ordinance extract.
County extract should cover outdoor lighting controls.
